title: cheilanthes rugosula
intro: Cheilanthes rugosula, also known as the wrinkled rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Cheilanthes rugosula has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and is believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine, making it a valuable resource for holistic health practitioners.
